species.citation: Hook.f. & Thomson ex Körn. , Ann. Mus. Bot. Lugduno-Batavi 3 (1867) 163 ; Merrill, EPFP 1 (1923) 192. var. alpestre. Distribution: China, India, Japan, Korea, Nepal, Philippines, Thailand, Tibet, Vietnam. MINDANAO: Davao. Notes: Open wet places. 1800m. Native. var. ampullarium P.Royen, Blumea 10 (1960) 126; Type: BS 31747 J.K. Santos (L). Distribution: LUZON: Benguet. Native.
species.distribution: LUZON: Benguet, MINDANAO: Davao, Davao del Sur, MINDORO.

species.citation: Merr. , PJS 2c (1907) 265 ; Merrill, EPFP 1 (1923) 192. var. brevipedunculatum. Distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. MINDORO. Notes: Seepage slopes in open heath. 2400m. Native.
R.Br. , Prodr. Fl. Nov. Holland. (1810) 254 ; Merr., Fl. Manila (1912) 136; Merrill, EPFP 1 (1923) 192.
species.distribution: Afghanistan, Africa, Australia, Bangladesh, China, India, Japan, Java, Korea, Laos, Malay Peninsula, Myanmar, Nepal, Philippines, Ryukyu Isls, Sri Lanka, Sumatra, Taiwan, Thailand, Vietnam. GUIMARAS, LUZON: Ifugao, Kalinga, Mountain Province, NCR, Quezon, Rizal, Zambales.
Endemic to the Philippines. LUZON: Benguet, Mountain Province, Quezon.

species.citation: Mart. , Pl. Asiat. Rar. 3 (1832) 28 ; Merrill, EPFP 1 (1923) 193.
species.distribution: Bangladesh, Cambodia, China, Laos, Myanmar, New Guinea, Philippines, Thailand, Vietnam. CULION.

species.citation: Merr. , PJS 10c (1915) 290 ; Merrill, EPFP 1 (1923) 193; Type: BS 5544 Ramos, Luzon: Benguet, Trinidad River, Dec-1908.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. LUZON: Benguet, Mountain Province, MINDANAO: Davao del Sur.

Bangladesh, Borneo, Cambodia, China, India, Java, Laos, Madagascar, Malay Peninsula, Myanmar, New Guinea, Pacific Ocean, Philippines, Ryukyu Isls, Sri Lanka, Sumatra, Taiwan, Thailand, Vietnam. LUZON: Benguet.

species.citation: Buch.-Ham. ex Mart. , Pl. Asiat. Rar. 3 (1832) 29 ; Merrill, EPFP 1 (1923) 193; Leach, Telopea 20 (2017) 251; Type: from India. var. truncatum. = Eriocaulon merrillii Ruhland, Fragm. Fl. Philipp. (1904) 136; Merr., Fl. Manila (1912)136; Merrill, EPFP 1 (1923) 193. Distribution: India to China and Malaysia. CULION, LUZON: Abra, Camarines, Ifugao, Mountain Province, Nueva Ecija, Nueva Vizcaya, Rizal, Sorsogon, Tarlac, Zambales, MINDANAO: Lanao, POLILLO, SIBUYAN. Notes: Low and medium elevation, in open wet places, rice paddies, etc. Native.
species.distribution: Africa, Australia, China, India, Japan, Java, Malaysia, Philippines, Singapore, Sri Lanka, Thailand. CULION, GUIMARAS, LUZON: Abra, Aurora, Camarines, Ifugao, Mountain Province, NCR, Nueva Ecija, Nueva Vizcaya, Rizal, Sorsogon, Tarlac, Zambales, MINDANAO: Lanao, MINDORO, PALAWAN, POLILLO, SIBUYAN.
Indian Ocean, Pacific Ocean, Philippines, SE Asia.

species.citation: Körn. , Linnaea 27 (1856) 682 ; Leach, Telopea 20 (2017) 253; Type: from Java. = Eriocaulon alatum Lecomte , J. Bot. (Morot), 2nd Sér. 1 (1908) 104 ; Merr., Fl. Manila (1912) 136; Merrill, EPFP 1 (1923) 192.
species.distribution: Australia, Indochina, Java, Lesser Sunda Isls, New Guinea, Philippines, Sulawesi, Sumatra. LUZON: Ifugao, NCR, Nueva Vizcaya, Rizal, MINDANAO: Davao del Sur.
species.notes: Low elevation open but wet grasslands.

species.citation: Ridl. , J. Fed. Malay States Mus. 10 (1920) 155.
species.notes: Reported for the Philippines by Moody (1989) as a weed in rice, but no specimens cited.

species.citation: Steud. , Syn. Pl. Glumac. 2 (1855) 271. = Eriocaulon infirmum var. puberulentum (Moldenke) P.Royen , Nova Guinea, N.S. 10 (1959) 36; ≡ Eriocaulon gracile var. puberulentum Moldenke , Phytologia 4 (1952) 128.
species.distribution: Cambodia, India, Laos, Myanmar, New Guinea, ?Philippines, Sumatra, Thailand, Vietnam. ?CULION.
